conflict.title: Tankers Entering Hormuz During Iran War Are Making Their Way Out
conflict.description: Almost all large non-Iranian tankers that have entered the Persian Gulf during the war appear to have successfully exited with a cargo, underscoring the emergence of a small group of shipowners willing to risk crossing the Strait of Hormuz.

conflict.title: Secretary-General Deeply Alarmed Reported Drone Strike Set Fire to Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, United Arab Emirates
conflict.description: I am deeply alarmed by reports that drone strikes set fire to an electrical generator within the perimeter of the Barakah Nuclear Power Plant, in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, on 17 May.
